action.description: The action of the rule can be allow or deny. When we set the `action = 'ALLOW'`, this is going to add a rule to allow traffic. Similarly, setting `action = 'DROP'` will deny the traffic.

direction.description: The direction of the rule can be `INGRESS` or `EGRESS`.

id.description: The ID of the security group rule

ip_type.description: The ip type of the security group rule

port_range.description: The port or port range to open, if the protocol is `ALL` this field is required `ALL`

protocol.description: The protocol of the security group rule include value `TCP`, `UDP`, `ICMP` or `ALL`

security_group_id.description: The security group id of the security group rule

sources.description: The sources of the rule, can be a CIDR notation or a IP address, pass `ALL` if you want to open for all IP

key.description: Filter database_flavors by this key. This may be one of `cpu`, `flavor_site`, `id`, `is_scale`, `memory_mb`, `name`.

match_by.description: One of `exact` (default), `re`, or `substring`. For string-typed fields, specify `re` to match by using the `values` as regular expressions, or specify `substring` to match by treating the `values` as substrings to find within the string field.

values.description: Only retrieves `database_flavors` which keys has value that matches one of the values provided here

direction.description: The sort direction. This may be either `asc` or `desc`.

match_by.description: One of `exact` (default), `re`, or `substring`. For string-typed fields, specify `re` to match by using the `values` as regular expressions, or specify `substring` to match by treating the `values` as substrings to find within the string field.

values.description: Only retrieves `storage_policies` which keys has value that matches one of the values provided here

block.description: One or more key/value pairs on which to filter results

direction.description: The sort direction. This may be either `asc` or `desc`.

apply_to.description: The list IP apply to of the security group

id.description: The id of the security group

name.description: The name of the security group

rules.description: The list IP apply to of the security group

tag_ids.description: List of tag IDs associated with the security group

type.description: Type of the security group, can be `ACL` (Control traffic through in and through out the internet) or `DFW` (Control traffic through in and through out the local network)

vpc_id.description: The vpc id of the security group

block.description:
Get information on a security group for use in other resources. This data source provides all of the security group properties as configured on your account.

An error will be raised if the provided security group does not exist in your account.

name.description: The name of the SSH key

public_key.description: The public key of the SSH key

block.description:
Get information on a SSH key. This data source provides the name as configured on your account.

An error will be raised if the provided SSH key name does not exist in your account.

Get information on a storage for use in other resources. This data source provides all of the storage properties as configured on your account.

An error will be raised if the provided storage name does not exist in your account.
